title: Vacancy for Category Manager at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates:
BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates!
